purpose: Current STT release status only. Historical/superseded proof chatter intentionally pruned from active reports.

private_v2.next: @dev-agent: fix content loss/substitution, first-visible draft gating, and detail transcript boundary. test-release-agent: rerun same human script after fix.

private_v4.reason: Prior browser worker/runtime attempts have not produced a scoreable non-empty save candidate.
private_v4.next: Hold unless product reopens v4 runtime work.

native.reason: 2026-06-04 real Chrome mic proof captured and saved full 55-word script; formatter invoked quickly (853ms, no error, word-preserving) but output still had bad truecasing (Starts Now) and detail transcript was empty.
native.next: @dev-agent: fix detail boundary, general truecasing/readability, and trust-label spacing. test-release-agent: rerun real mic after fix.

latestPrivateDecodeParameterAb.conclusion: Do not ship this anti-hallucination decode configuration. It worsened h1_6; keep current defaults unless dev proposes a new candidate.

privateVadPrototypeGate.requiredFlag: A named runtime flag such as PRIVATE_VAD_PROTOTYPE=1, with candidate thresholds recorded in artifacts.
privateVadPrototypeGate.passRule: Improve or preserve baseline accuracy on h1_6 and the human script, preserve onset/tail words and fillers, and avoid >10% timing regression. Onset clipping, tail loss, or worse semantic substitution fails.
